shortRoleReason: Central role managing business and administrative functions
companySummary: Evergreen Foster Care is a forward-thinking fostering agency dedicated to building futures for children and families.
roleSummary: The Business Manager oversees business and administrative functions, supporting senior leaders to ensure the agency operates efficiently.
headlineAttraction: Make a real impact in a growing fostering agency
rolePurpose: To manage business operations and administrative functions to ensure the agency runs efficiently.
advertSummary: Evergreen Foster Care seeks a driven Business Manager to handle HR, finance, IT, facilities, compliance, and fostering panel support, working closely with senior leadership to drive smooth agency operations in a purpose-led environment.
coreResponsibilities: Lead business and administrative functions across HR, finance, IT, facilities, and compliance
Support fostering panel processes including minute-taking and coordination
Manage HR processes, safer recruitment, and employee records
Process payroll and foster carer payments
Oversee office operations, meetings, and training coordination
Act as a key point of contact for stakeholders, carers, and external partners
Support social workers with administrative tasks
essentialRequirements: Proven experience in a business or senior administrative role
Experience with payroll systems such as SAGE
Excellent organisational skills and attention to detail
Proactive and able to work independently and in a team

personalisedContent.personalisedOpening: I am excited by the opportunity to bring my operational leadership and transformation experience to a role that directly supports children and families. I thrive in fast-paced environments where structured processes and effective communication drive real results.
personalisedContent.whyThisCompany: I am drawn to Evergreen Foster Care’s purpose-led mission and commitment to making a tangible difference in the lives of children. The agency’s growth and focus on building futures for families align perfectly with my values and motivation to contribute meaningfully.
personalisedContent.whyThisRole: This Business Manager position suits my background in managing cross-functional operations, HR processes, and financial control in complex settings. I enjoy creating structure, supporting teams, and delivering reliable performance to help organisations run efficiently.

selectedEvidenceExamples.exampleTitle: Operational Turnaround in NHS Primary Care
selectedEvidenceExamples.whyChosen: Demonstrates ability to improve performance, processes, and reporting in a regulated environment.
selectedEvidenceExamples.shortLine: Delivered measurable operational and financial improvements in a complex healthcare setting.

selectedEvidenceExamples.whyChosen: Shows capability in running multi-disciplinary operations including finance and team oversight.
selectedEvidenceExamples.shortLine: Managed production, people, and reporting in a fast-moving manufacturing environment.

personalisedContent.fitSummary: My career demonstrates a consistent ability to bring structure, improve operational performance, and manage multi-functional teams. I can contribute immediately to ensuring Evergreen Foster Care’s operations run smoothly and compliantly.
personalisedContent.likelyContributionSummary: In this role I would aim to streamline administrative processes, strengthen compliance, and ensure the agency’s HR, finance, and panel functions support its mission effectively.
companyHighlights: Impactful work for children and families
personalisedContent.cultureFitSummary: I thrive in purpose-driven, fast-paced environments where structure and clear processes support meaningful outcomes.
personalisedContent.closingSummary: I would welcome the chance to contribute my operational expertise to support your mission and growth.
contentNotes: Company detail in advert is limited

examples.title: Operational Turnaround in NHS Primary Care
